How it works

Live in 48 hours.

No developers. No months of setup. Fill in your details and your branded school app is live.

1

Sign up & set your brand

Add your school name, logo, and brand colour.

2

Configure Grace AI

Set class levels. Grace assesses learners automatically.

3

Invite trainers & learners

Send invite links. Everyone gets instant access.

4

Collect & grow

Subscriptions and payments — all handled.

Platform features

Everything your school needs,
nothing it doesn't.

One platform for classes, AI, payments, live sessions, and your branded learner app.

Full White-Label

Your logo, colour, subdomain. Learners only see your school.

Grace AI

AI that assesses learners via camera, generates practice plans, and recaps sessions.

Learner App

PWA + native iOS/Android. Live sessions, leaderboard, 1:1 booking — all included.

Built-in Payments

Monthly, term, annual subscriptions. Automated trainer payouts.

Revenue Dashboard

MRR, churn, attendance — all in one clean admin view.

Skill Trees & Progress

XP, badges, leaderboards, and promotion assessments.

Who it's for

Built for any training school.

Music, martial arts, fitness, language, corporate training.

Music
Martial Arts
Fitness
Language
Corporate
Pricing

Simple pricing.
No surprises.

14-day free trial on all plans. No setup fees. Cancel anytime.

Starter
S$199
/month · up to 50 learners
  • White-label app
  • 1 trainer
  • Grace AI assessments
  • Subscription billing
Growth · Most Popular
S$449
/month · up to 150 learners
  • Everything in Starter
  • Up to 5 trainers
  • Custom domain
  • Grace AI practice plans
  • 1:1 session marketplace
Scale
S$899
/month · up to 500 learners
  • Everything in Growth
  • Up to 15 trainers
  • Native iOS & Android
  • Advanced analytics
Enterprise
Custom
unlimited learners
  • Everything in Scale
  • Dedicated account manager

Aleph
F Chord Self-Assessment
Submitted today · 2h ago · Video · 0:28
94%
Overall score
Pass
Threshold 70%
97%
AI confidence
SUBMISSION VIDEO · 0:28
Grace AI detected: clean F chord placement at 0:08, 0:14, 0:21 0:28
✦ GRACE'S DETAILED SCORING
Open Chord Accuracy
Weight: 30%
95%
28.5 / 30 pts
All 4 open chord shapes clean. F chord fully barred at fret 1 with no muted strings on 3 of 4 attempts. Minor buzz on 4th attempt — negligible.
Basic Strumming
Weight: 25%
92%
23 / 25 pts
Down-up pattern consistent. Slight hesitation before the transition at 0:14 but recovered cleanly. Strong wrist movement.
Song Completion
Weight: 25%
96%
24 / 25 pts
Played through "How Great Thou Art" verse + chorus without stopping. Only minor pause at bridge (2 beats) — well within acceptable range.
Timing 60bpm
Weight: 20%
94%
18.8 / 20 pts
Beat adherence 94% across 120 beat window. A few 8th-note fluctuations but well within beginner tolerance. No significant rushing or dragging.
YOUR REVIEW
OVERRIDE SCORE (OPTIONAL)
%
Leave blank to accept Grace's 94%

NOTES FOR GRACE
G
Grace is thinking...
Reading your materials...
GRACE CREATED THIS
Aleph Week 14 · Barre Chord Mastery
From 3 materials · 29 learners · 5 drills
Build barre chord confidence through progressive drills. Focus on F chord first, then Bm transitions mid-week. Each drill uses a worship song.
1
F Chord Placement Drill
15 reps · 5 min
2
F → C Transitions
20 reps · 7 min
3
How Great Thou Art — Play-along
1 full run · 8 min
4
Bm Introduction
15 reps · 6 min
5
Self-Assessment Video
30s submission · Grace reviews

Transcript
SUMMARY
Tonight the class finally got the F barre chord. 23 of 29 played it cleanly by end of hour. Key shift: loosening the grip and moving the thumb lower.
✦ KEY MOMENTS
12:04
Breakthrough — first clean F chord together.
23:18
Teaching — thumb-behind-neck demo.
38:42
Song — How Great Thou Art play-along.
52:15
Q&A — Ruth asked about Bm.
✅ PRACTICE THIS WEEK
1
10 min/day of F chord drill
2
F → C transitions at 50 bpm
3
Record 30s video by Sunday
⭐ SHOUTOUTS
JD
Joshua Dela Cruz
First clean F chord on 3rd attempt. Persistence paid off.
MT
Miguel Tan
Helped a classmate with thumb position. Peer-teaching.
See you Tuesday — bring your capos. Listen to "How Great Thou Art" at half speed and tap along. Keep going.
— Pastor T

Help & Support
Help & Support
AppyClass · GraceStrings Institution Support
WhatsApp
Reply in 1 hour
Email us
support@appyclass.net
A
APPYCLASS AI ASSISTANT
A
AppyClass Support AI
Hi Grace 👋 I'm the AppyClass support assistant for institution admins. I can help with payouts, payments, managing classes, technical issues, and anything else about running GraceStrings on AppyClass.

What can I help you with today?
How to add a class?
Payout timing?
Learner login issue
Upgrade plan
INSTITUTION FAQs
Managing Classes
Add, delete, rename, capacity, schedules
How do I add a new class?
Go to Classes in the sidebar and tap + New in the top right. Fill in the class name, level, schedule and assign a trainer. The class will appear immediately in your Timetable and on your trainers' dashboards.
How do I delete or archive a class?
Open the class from Classes, scroll to Settings tab, and choose Archive class or Delete. Archiving keeps all historical data (attendance, recaps, assessments) while hiding the class from active view. Deletion is permanent — we recommend archiving instead.
Can I change the trainer assigned to a class?
Yes. Open the class → Settings tab → change the Assigned Trainer dropdown. The new trainer immediately sees the class in their dashboard. Historical data stays attributed to the previous trainer.
How do I set a maximum class size?
In Settings → Learner Access you can set a default max class size. You can also override it per class in the class Settings tab. When the limit is reached, new learners are waitlisted.
Can learners be in more than one class?
Yes. A learner can be enrolled in multiple classes simultaneously. Their progress and assessments are tracked separately per class. Billing is per learner per class.
Payouts & Payments
Release payouts, failed payments, refunds
When are trainer payouts processed?
Payouts are released by you manually from Payout Details — you can do this at any time during the month. The default payout schedule is monthly, but you can change it to bi-monthly or weekly in Settings → Payout Settings. AppyClass does not auto-release on your behalf without your approval.
Why does the payout amount look different from revenue?
Trainer payouts reflect their revenue share (default 70%) of their gross class earnings. The remaining 30% is the platform fee retained by GraceStrings. You can see the exact split breakdown per trainer in Payout Details → View details.
A trainer's bank transfer failed — what do I do?
If a transfer fails, it will appear as Failed in Payout History within 2 banking days. Ask the trainer to update their bank details in their Payout Details page. Once updated, re-release the payout from your admin panel. Contact AppyClass support if the issue persists.
Can I issue a refund to a learner?
Refunds are initiated from the learner's profile. Go to Learners, find the learner, and select Issue refund. Refunds typically process within 5–10 business days. Partial refunds (e.g. prorated for classes missed) are also supported.
How does AppyClass charge GraceStrings?
AppyClass charges your saved payment method monthly for the Pro plan (S$29/mo) and any add-ons. This is separate from trainer payouts — your AppyClass subscription is billed automatically. You can download invoices in My Subscription → Billing.
Can I change a trainer's revenue share percentage?
Yes. Go to Settings → Payout Settings to change the default for all new trainers. To change an existing trainer's share, open their trainer profile and override it there. Changes apply from the following payout period.
Learners
Enrolment, removing, transfers, access
How do I add a learner to GraceStrings?
Go to Learners → + Invite or send an invite link from the class Settings. Learners receive an email to create their account. Alternatively, enable Open Registration in Settings → Learner Access so anyone with the link can self-enrol.
How do I remove a learner from a class?
Open Classes → [Class] → Learners, find the learner, and tap Remove. They lose access to the class immediately. Their historical attendance and assessment data is retained for your records. If you want to remove them from GraceStrings entirely, go to Learners and delete their profile.
A learner says they can't log in — what should I do?
First check they're using the right email address (their AppyClass login). Ask them to use Forgot password on the login screen. If that doesn't work, contact AppyClass support with the learner's email and we'll investigate within 1 hour.
Can I move a learner from one class to another?
Yes — this is a class transfer. Go to the learner's profile, tap Transfer class, and select the new class. Grace AI's assessment record and progress data moves with them. You can also use the Promote tab in AI Assessment for learners Grace has flagged as ready to advance.
What happens when I hit my learner limit?
New enrolments are paused and learners are waitlisted. You'll see a warning in My Subscription. You can add extra learner seats (S$9/mo per 50 seats) without changing your plan, or upgrade to School (500 learner cap). Existing learners are not affected.
Trainers
Inviting, removing, permissions, rev share
How do I invite a new trainer?
Go to Classes → Invite another trainer (at the bottom) or Revenue → + Invite trainer. Enter their name, email, assign classes, and set a revenue share. They receive an invite email and get their own trainer dashboard once they accept.
How do I remove a trainer?
Go to the trainer's profile in Payout Details and select Remove trainer. Their classes are unassigned (you can reassign them to another trainer). Any pending payout for the current period is still due to them. Their historical data is retained.
Can a trainer see other trainers' classes or revenue?
No. Trainers only see their own assigned classes, learners, and earnings. Only admins (you) have access to the full institution overview across all trainers.
How many trainers can I have?
The Pro plan allows up to 5 trainers. School allows 20. Enterprise is unlimited. If you need more trainers before upgrading, contact support — we can temporarily increase the limit for an existing plan.
Technical Issues
Login problems, Zoom, app errors, data
The Zoom session link isn't working — what do I do?
Check that the Zoom integration is connected in Settings → Integrations. If it was working before, try disconnecting and reconnecting the Zoom account. Zoom outages are rare but check status.zoom.us for platform issues. As a fallback, use Google Meet — paste the link into your class broadcast.
Grace AI isn't generating assessments — what's wrong?
First check that video upload is enabled for the class in AI Assessment → By Class → [Class]. If enabled, check that the learner submitted a video (not just a note). Video processing takes 2–5 minutes. If the issue persists after 10 minutes, contact support with the learner's name and submission time.
Session recaps aren't sending to learners
Check the notification channels in the recap settings (email/in-app toggles). Also verify learner email addresses are correct in their profiles. Some email providers may filter AppyClass emails to spam — ask learners to check and whitelist noreply@appyclass.net.
How do I export my institution's data?
Go to Settings → Danger Zone → Export all data. You'll receive a CSV and JSON export of all learners, attendance, revenue, assessments and sessions. The export is emailed to your admin email within 10 minutes.
The dashboard is showing wrong revenue figures
Revenue figures update every 15 minutes. If numbers still look wrong after a refresh, check if any refunds were issued recently (these reduce the monthly total). For persistent discrepancies, contact support with a specific month and the expected vs shown figures — we'll audit the payment records.
G
Grace AI
How it works, accuracy, configuration
How does Grace AI assess learners?
Grace analyses video or audio submissions from learners against the criteria you configure in AI Assessment → By Class. She scores each criterion (e.g. chord accuracy, timing, strumming pattern) and weights them according to your settings. Scores above your passing threshold are auto-approved if you've turned that on.
How accurate is Grace AI?
Grace currently operates at ~92% accuracy against trainer-reviewed scores across all GraceStrings assessments. The more you review and override, the better she calibrates to your specific standards. You can see your institution's accuracy score in AI Assessment → Activity.
Can I turn off Grace AI for specific classes?
Yes. In AI Assessment → By Class, select the class and toggle AI Assessment Active off. The class will revert to manual assessment only — trainers review submissions directly without Grace's pre-scoring.
Does Grace AI learn over time?
Yes. Every time you approve or override a Grace score, that signal trains her calibration for your institution specifically. After ~50 reviews, accuracy typically improves by 3–5%. Grace also updates her session recap and practice plan generation based on what you publish vs discard.
Subscription & Billing
Plans, invoices, cancellation, upgrades
How do I upgrade from Pro to School?
Go to My Subscription → Upgrade plan → School and tap the upgrade button. You'll be charged the prorated difference for the current billing period immediately. Your new limits (20 trainers, 500 learners, 50 GB) are active within minutes.
Can I cancel my AppyClass subscription?
Yes, there's no lock-in. Go to Settings → Danger Zone or contact support. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period. Your data is retained for 90 days after cancellation, during which you can export it.
Where can I download invoices?
Go to My Subscription → Subscription & Billing. The last 12 months of invoices are listed there as PDF downloads. For older invoices, contact support at support@appyclass.net.
My payment failed — what happens to my school's access?
After a failed payment, you have a 7-day grace period to update your payment method before access is restricted. Trainer and learner dashboards remain active during this time. You'll receive email reminders on days 1, 3 and 6. Update your card in My Subscription → Payment method → Update.
PLATFORM STATUS
All systems operational
Last checked 4 min ago · status.appyclass.net
Still need help?
Our institution support team typically replies within 1 hour on weekdays, 4 hours on weekends (SGT).

✦ GRACE
Setting up your camera...
G
C
Em
D
Camera never stored · Server-side analysis only
📤
Record & Upload Your Playing
Grace will analyse your video within 5 minutes
and send you a full assessment report
WHAT TO RECORD (2–3 minutes):
1️⃣
Play a G chord. Hold it for 5 seconds. Show your fretting hand clearly.
2️⃣
Switch between G and C chord 5 times. Normal pace.
3️⃣
Strum any song you know for 30 seconds. Or just strum open strings.
📁
Tap to select video
MP4, MOV · Max 100MB · 2–5 min ideal

✓
G chord shape forming — clean fretting on 3 strings

Natural strumming wrist — good starting position

Ring finger slightly flat — needs curl practice

Thumb over the neck — very common for beginners

Barre Chord Guide
⋯
PDF · 12 PAGES
Barre Chord Guide
Preview
Download
AI Ready · Analyzed
Aleph
Barre Chord Guide
Uploaded Mar 20, 2026 · 2.3 MB · 12 pages
4
Plans using this
2
Quizzes
29
Learner views
TAGS
barre-chords F-chord technique beginner
G
Grace's Analysis
AI understanding of this material
94% confidence
SUMMARY
A 12-page beginner-friendly guide covering barre chord fundamentals, with a focus on the F chord. Explains finger placement, common mistakes, and includes 6 progression exercises from easy to intermediate.
KEY CONCEPTS
Barre technique Finger pressure F → Bm transitions Thumb positioning 6 exercises
BEST FOR
Beginners struggling with barre chords · Week 10–14 curriculum
GENERATE FROM THIS MATERIAL
Practice Plan
Weekly drills
Quiz
5–20 questions
Worksheet
Printable PDF
Broadcast
Message to class
USED IN
Aleph Week 12 Practice Plan
Plan · Sent Mar 22 · 29 learners
Active

G
Grace is thinking...
Reading your materials...
GRACE CREATED THIS · REVIEW BEFORE PUBLISHING
Aleph Week 14 · Barre Chord Mastery
Drafted from 3 materials · For 29 learners · 5 drills · ~25 min/day
Edit
PLAN THEME
Build barre chord confidence through progressive daily drills. Focus on the F chord first, then introduce Bm transitions by mid-week. Each drill incorporates a worship song so students practice in musical context.
1
F Chord Finger Placement Drill
15 reps · 5 min · Source: Barre Chord Guide.pdf pp. 3–5
Day 1–2
2
F → C Transition Practice
20 reps · 7 min · Source: Week 12 Lesson Notes.docx
Day 2–3
3
How Great Thou Art — Slow Tempo Play-Along
1 full run · 8 min · Barre F in chorus
Day 3–4
4
Bm Introduction + F/Bm Switching
15 reps · 6 min · Source: Chord Chart.png
Day 4–5
5
Self-Assessment · Record & Submit
Record 30s video of F chord · Grace reviews pressure & clarity
Day 6–7
📎 SOURCES GRACE USED
Barre Chord Guide.pdf
Week 12 Lesson Notes.docx
Chord Chart.png
←

Aleph
Live · Week 13
✦ Drafted by Grace · Mar 22
F Chord Transitions
Build confidence with the F chord through progressive drills. Focus on finger placement first, then introduce C and Bm transitions. Each drill pairs a technical exercise with a worship song for musical context.
68%
Class avg completion
✦ Regenerate
Archive
5
Drills
~25min/d
Daily time
7days
Duration
29
Learners
+12%
vs last week
Drills & Schedule
Learner Progress · 29
Activity Log
Sources & AI
5 Drills · Sequenced for 7 days
+ Add drill
1
F Chord Finger Placement
Day 1–2
Slow, deliberate placement of the F chord without strumming. Focus on thumb position behind the neck and index-finger barre pressure. Repeat 15 times with 30-second rests.
15 reps
·
5 min
·
Barre Chord Guide.pdf pp. 3–5
26/29
completed
2
F → C Transition Practice
Day 2–3
Practice switching between F and C chords at 60 bpm. Use a metronome. Focus on minimal finger movement between shapes. 20 clean switches.
20 reps
·
7 min
·
Week 12 Lesson Notes.docx
23/29
completed
3
How Great Thou Art — Slow Tempo Play-Along
Day 3–4
Play along with the slow-tempo track. Barre F appears in the chorus bridge. Focus on staying in time rather than perfection.
1 full run
·
8 min
·
Play-along audio
18/29
in progress
4
Bm Introduction + F/Bm Switching
Day 4–5
Introduce the Bm chord shape. Practice alternating F and Bm with focus on wrist position. Use chord chart reference.
15 reps
·
6 min
·
Chord Chart.png
14/29
in progress
5
Self-Assessment · Record & Submit
Day 6–7
✦ AI graded
Record a 30-second video demonstrating the F chord + 1 transition. Grace will review pressure, clarity, and timing.
Video upload
·

G
Grace's Reasoning
Why this plan works for Aleph
Aleph learners completed Week 12's basic chord plan with 94% — they're ready for the next step. Barre chords were flagged as a pain point in 8 self-assessments. Starting with slow finger placement (no strumming) builds correct muscle memory before adding rhythm. Pairing with a familiar worship song reduces cognitive load.
CONFIDENCE
92%

G
Grace's Take
Updated 4h ago
Ruth made solid progress on drills 1–3 but stalled mid-way through the Bm introduction. Her F → C transition took 9 min (target: 7). The Bm shape is likely the sticking point — not the switching.
RECOMMEND
✦ Send 5-min Bm-only drill
⏰ Extend deadline 2 days
🎥 Offer 15-min 1:1 session
SUBMISSIONS
F → C practice clip
Mar 26 · 0:28
No other submissions yet

F Chord Breakthrough

Aleph
✦ Grace draft · awaiting review
Session 3 · Mar 22
F Chord Breakthrough
Tuesday · 8:00–9:00 PM · 27 of 29 learners attended
G
Grace drafted · 3h ago
Based on session audio transcript
60min
Session length
27/29
Attended
4
Key moments
3
Action items
2
Shoutouts
Recap Content
Attendance · 27
Transcript & Audio
Engagement
SUMMARY
Tonight the class finally got the F barre chord. 23 of 29 of you played it cleanly by the end of the hour — a big leap from last week. The key shift was loosening the grip and moving the thumb lower on the neck, which we drilled in rounds 2 and 3. Between rounds, we slowed the metronome down to 50 bpm and that seemed to unlock it for most of you.
✦ KEY MOMENTS GRACE NOTICED
12:04
Breakthrough moment: Most of the class played their first clean F chord together. Big cheer from Joshua and Miguel.
23:18
Teaching moment: Demonstrated thumb-behind-neck technique. Worth practicing daily — Grace recommends embedding in next week's plan.
38:42
Song moment: Played "How Great Thou Art" together. 18 of you attempted the barre F in the bridge — most stayed in time.
52:15
Q&A: Ruth asked about Bm shape — good question. Grace drafted a sidebar explainer (attached below).
✅ WHAT TO PRACTICE THIS WEEK
1
10 min/day of F chord placement drill
Just finger placement — no strumming yet
2
Practice F → C transitions at 50 bpm
Slow is smooth, smooth is fast
3
Record a 30s video of your F chord by Sunday
Grace will review pressure and clarity
⭐ SHOUTOUTS
JD
Joshua Dela Cruz
First clean F chord on the 3rd attempt. The persistence paid off — great to watch.
MT
Miguel Tan
Helped a classmate with thumb position during round 2. Peer-teaching — exactly what we need.
See you Tuesday — bring your capos. If you've got Spotify, listen to the original recording of "How Great Thou Art" at half speed and tap along. Keep going, you're getting there.
— Pastor T
Before sending

Session Transcript
🔍 Search
↓ .txt
00:14
Pastor T: Alright everybody, welcome back. Tonight we're tackling the F chord — the one most of you told me last week you wanted to crack.
02:47
Joshua: Is the thumb supposed to go behind or around the neck?
03:02
Pastor T: Great question — behind. Low. The lower your thumb, the less pressure you need in the barre finger.
12:04
[multiple]: [chord rings out cleanly · laughter · applause] ✦ Grace marked this as a key moment
12:20
Miguel: Wait, wait — I got it too!
Show full 60-minute transcript →

Ask Grace AI

›
TRAINER FAQs
When do I get paid?
Payouts on the 1st of every month to your registered bank account.
How do I grow my class?
GraceStrings handles all marketing. High session ratings boost your visibility.
Can I teach on weekends only?
Yes! Set your live class day in Availability Hours.
How does Grace AI help me?
Grace handles all assessments and generates personalised 7-day practice plans.
What if a learner disputes?
Contact support via WhatsApp. We mediate within 24 hours.

TRAINER FAQs
When do I get paid?
Payouts on the 1st of every month to your registered bank account.
How do I grow my class?
GraceStrings handles all marketing. High session ratings boost your visibility.
Can I teach on weekends only?
Yes! Set your live class day in Availability Hours.
How does Grace AI help me?
Grace handles all assessments and generates personalised 7-day practice plans.
What if a learner disputes?
Contact support via WhatsApp. We mediate within 24 hours.
